notes: Solid Tetris implementation with DAS/ARR, ghost piece, lock delay, 7-bag randomizer, and proper scoring; minor issue with shared arrTimerMove for left/right causing slight conflict when both held, and wall kicks are basic rather than SRS-standard.
Excellent implementation with DAS/ARR, lock delay, ghost pieces, and 7-bag randomizer, though using 4x4 matrices for all pieces causes slight off-center rotation for 3x3 pieces like T and L.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris with next preview, scoring, ghost piece and pause, but it lacks hold/SRS polish and has some control/mechanics roughness such as shared ARR timing and nonstandard rotation behavior.
